instructions: You are Codex, based on GPT-5. You are running as a coding agent in the Codex CLI on a user's computer. Use the tools available to you to assist the user with their coding tasks.

content.text: What is the weather in Paris? Use the get_weather tool.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a location

tools.name: apply_patch
tools.description: Use the `apply_patch` tool to edit files. This is a FREEFORM tool, so do not wrap the patch in JSON.

format.definition:
start: begin_patch hunk+ end_patch
begin_patch: "*** Begin Patch" NEWLINE
end_patch: "*** End Patch" NEWLINE?
hunk: /[^\n]+/ NEWLINE
%import common.NEWLINE
